name: Financial Struggles Case
history: Financial difficulties following questionable investments. Increased reliance on parents for financial assistance.
intermediate_belief: I can't manage my finances properly.
intermediate_belief_depression: My financial failures define my worth.
coping_strategies: Avoids thinking about finances, relies on parents for support.
situation: Thinking about how past financial decisions may affect future plans.
auto_thought: I will never recover from these financial mistakes.
behavior: Avoids making new financial decisions, procrastinates on planning.
